content.en:
Rumble!!!!

The invisible power descended into Ye Tian's soul, constantly refining Ye Tian's soul.

And this kind of refining is forcibly refined, which is completely beyond the limit of Ye Tian's soul.

In an instant, Ye Tian's soul was shattered, but it recovered under the strange energy without any sequelae.

In this way, the shattering heals and then refining, and the shattering healing re-quenching.

Such tempering again and again made Ye Tian's soul stronger and stronger.

Of course, the pain in this is not something that ordinary invincible Dao Ancestors can bear.

Ye Tian could still bear it, because he had copied countless souls, and every fusion was very painful, so he was used to it.

"Soul refining, body refining, and Dao refining are completely suitable for my Extreme Dao Inheritance, and I can just take advantage of this opportunity to cultivate the Extreme Dao Inheritance!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he began to cultivate the Extreme Dao Inheritance, constantly refining his soul, and striving to refine his soul to the Extreme Dao level as soon as possible.

......

With the passage of time, an invincible Dao Ancestor went through soul refining, body refining, and Dao refining, and finally couldn't hold on, and came out of the Three Refining Void one by one.

And after the tempering of the three refining voids, they have all reached the extreme on the path of invincible Dao ancestors, and their souls, physical bodies, and Dao power are all inadvancing, and the best of them have a new understanding of the forbidden Dao from the soul refining, and have completed the integration of the forbidden Dao with themselves.

The remaining condition is to comprehend more of the mysteries of the Domain Ancestor, and many Invincible Dao Ancestors have also continued to enter the Eternal Source Stone Statue to comprehend, and it is not very difficult to comprehend the mystery of the Domain Ancestor.

In the blink of an eye, three thousand years have passed.

With the help of the Three Refining Void and the Eternal Source Stone Statue, three Invincible Dao Ancestors completely completed the accumulation of the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, and successfully impacted the half-step Domain Ancestor level, becoming the new half-step Domain Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain.

And at this time, some half-step domain ancestors were still holding on to the Three Refining Void.

Of course, most of the half-step domain ancestors were in the process of refining their bodies or refining the Dao, and only a few half-step domain ancestors were still in the process of refining their souls.

One of them who was refining his soul was Ye Tian.

He has always insisted on refining his soul, and with the inheritance of the Extreme Dao, he was able to persist for a longer time, coupled with his own willpower is very terrifying, so he has insisted on refining his soul for three thousand years, and he is still far from reaching the limit.

"My soul is at least three times stronger than before!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

At his level, it was very difficult to continue to improve a little, let alone more than three times as powerful as his soul!

With his current soul level, even many half-step domain ancestors were not as good as him!

Originally, Ye Tian had no idea when he would be able to step into the Extreme Dao level, although he was very confident that he would be able to step into the Extreme Dao level, but he couldn't touch the limit, and that feeling was a little confused.

But at this moment, he had already vaguely felt the level of the Soul Extreme.

Hang on!

Hold on!

Ye Tian planned to directly use the Three Refining Void Heaven to advance himself to the Extreme Dao level, even if he couldn't advance, he would at least approach the Extreme Dao level.

Time passed slowly, and it seemed like a year for Ye Tian.

In the blink of an eye, another 3,000 years have passed.

At this time, there was only one person left among the Dao Ancestors who were still refining souls.

Three refinements outside the void.

The Wind Mountain Mountain Lord opened his eyes and looked at the Three Refining Void, although he couldn't completely see the situation of the Three Refining Void, he also roughly knew what the Dao Ancestors of the Three Refining Void were in.

"Hey, there is another Dao Ancestor refining souls, who is it?"

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain was curious.

At this time, he is still refining his soul, and this bearing capacity is too strong.

"Jinchen, Flame Crack, Wind Void, Stygian Sea?"

The Wind Mountain Mountain Lord recalled these Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors in his mind, but after thinking about it carefully, something was wrong, he knew more about these Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, it was not the first time they had entered the Three Refining Void, and the first time they had not lasted so long, and the second time the effect was much worse, so it was impossible for them to still insist on refining their souls.

Abrupt.

He thought of Ye Tian, but shook his head again.

Ye Tiancai is invincible at the Dao Ancestor level, he doesn't think that Ye Tian can persist in refining souls until now, that is not realistic.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's soul refining was already close to the limit.

It's a pity that his soul hasn't been raised to the extreme level.

"The Extreme Dao level is really difficult, I originally got the Black Wood Forbidden Treasure to assist in cultivating the Extreme Dao Inheritance, and now I have entered the Three Refining Void, but I still haven't reached the Extreme Dao level, no wonder it is mentioned in the Extreme Dao Inheritance, those who are not gifted, atmospheric transporters, and those with great perseverance should not take the Extreme Dao Path. "

Ye Tian muttered.

If the ordinary invincible Dao Ancestor insists on taking the Extreme Dao Path, it is estimated that it will take a lifetime to not think of stepping into the Extreme Dao level.

According to Ye Tian's estimate, his Soul Extreme Dao path is estimated to have only half of it, but this kind of progress is already very exaggerated.

In terms of soul strength, he was at least six times stronger than before.

Soon, Ye Tian's soul refining reached its limit, and the soul refining process was over.

After Ye Tian rested for about three days, the refining process began.

Click!!

In just an instant, Ye Tian's flesh began to crack, completely exploding into a cloud of blood mist, and then instantly recovered under the action of strange energy.

In this way, Ye Tian continued to refine his physical body in the process of exploding and agglomerating, making the strength of his physical body stronger and stronger, and the strength of his physical body was also rapidly improving.

And Ye Tian also took advantage of this opportunity to continue to refine the physical body with the secret technique of the Extreme Dao inheritance, and continuously advanced the physical body to the Extreme Dao level.

In the blink of an eye, 8,000 years have passed.

"The physical body is seven times stronger, and the foundation is stronger and stronger than before!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And at this time, he almost reached the limit, and in desperation, he ended the refining process and began the refining process.

----------

Three refinements outside the void.

A half-step domain ancestor resides here.

Soon, the last half-step domain ancestor Jinchen Dao Ancestor came out.

"They should all come out!"

The Flame Crack Dao Ancestor spoke.

At this time, the Mountain Lord of Fengshan Mountain spoke: "The Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor has not come out yet, he is the only one left, and he has just started refining the Dao Quenching!"

"What, this can't be!"

Jin Chen Dao Ancestor said incredulously.

The other half-step domain ancestors also couldn't believe it, Ye Tiancai was invincible Dao Ancestor level, even if his combat power was comparable to the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, it was also the realm of invincible Dao Ancestor!

Moreover, even if Ye Tian was a true half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, he was not the opponent of Jinchen Dao Ancestor at present, whether it was his body, soul, or Dao power strength, he was not as good as Jinchen Dao Ancestor!

But now, the Jinchen Dao Ancestor has come out, and the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor Ye Tiancai has begun to refine the Dao, and the gap is too big!

"Hahaha, this just shows that the potential of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor is incredible, maybe after he comes out, his strength will be greatly improved, even if he does not enter the half-step domain ancestor, but the combat power is probably comparable to the powerful Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestor!"

The mountain lord of Fengshan said happily.
